description_long: This candle features a cylindrical blue holder with vertical grooves evenly spaced around its exterior, giving it a modern, industrial look. The holder appears to be made of metal or painted ceramic, with a matte finish and a slightly raised base. At the center, a beige wax candle protrudes above the rim, with a visible wick at the top. The candle is solid and unlit, with no visible wax drips or signs of previous use. The design suggests durability and stability, making it suitable for outdoor or urban environments such as parks or public plazas. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with a focus on geometric simplicity and robust construction.
description: A blue cylindrical candle holder with vertical grooves and a beige wax candle at its center, featuring a visible wick and a modern, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue cylindrical holder with deep vertical grooves and the beige candle centered at the top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the grooves and the even height of the candle within the holder.
description_view_2: The candle and holder appear identical to other views, emphasizing the uniformity of the design.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the same vertical grooves and the centered beige candle, consistent with other angles.
